title: AFRL Inspire: Rewind - 2020
text: An in-person AFRL Inspire 2020 was postponed due to COVID-19. So AFRL went virtual, taking a look back on talks from 2017 and 2016 dealing with pandemics and aircraft decontamination. Next we transitioned to present day May 2020 to discuss advances in technology and its application during a pandemic, with the original speakers.
